clientMessages.author: max.hastings
clientMessages.content:
Thank you for your patience while we reviewed and recovered your Business Manager (686217510778874).

In the event of unauthorized ad spend this will be reversed, with credit memos as required, at our sole discretion and without admission of liability

The next time users on your Business Manager log into Facebook, they may notice some steps to help them secure their account. This helps to prevent unauthorized access to their profile. You can take further action to help secure your account by:

Picking a strong and unique password, not sharing your password with anyone, and enabling two-factor authentication; and

Checking your Business Manager account to:
1. Review the people, Pages and accounts associated with your business and the level of access they have in your Business Settings
2. Ensure there are no unauthorized pending invitations to people, Pages and accounts in your Business Settings - Requests


Visit our Help Center for more ways to help make your account more secure. Learn More (https://fburl.com/l1koc4ft).
